generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel who's seen our civil defense systems up close, I'm telling you: we're already spending enough on preparedness. The real threat isn't lack of funding - it's bureaucratic waste. My experience shows local communities are far better at handling emergencies than Washington ever was. Let's focus on accountability before throwing more money at the problem. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
